name: pva-bazaar-stream-embed
description: PVA Bazaar Universal Stream Embed + monetisation system for the ricktaur Twitch channel. Run locally or deploy to Netlify.

scripts.toggle: node -e "require('http').get('http://localhost:8888/dev/toggle-live', r => { let d=''; r.on('data',c=>d+=c); r.on('end',()=>console.log(d)); })"

author: ricktaur / PVA Bazaar
